Age Calculator

Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Includes countdown to next birthday, zodiac sign, and fun statistics.

Select your date of birth, then click Calculate Age to see your exact age.

Result Bottom Banner (728×90)

About This Tool

This age calculator computes your exact chronological age — down to the day — between any two dates. It also shows the countdown to your next birthday, your zodiac sign, the day of the week you were born, and fun statistics like total hours and minutes you've been alive.

All calculations are performed locally in your browser — no data is sent anywhere.

Read the full guide
